job.title: Senior Software Engineer -UI @ Barclays (MH, IN)
job.description:
Date live: 07/16/2026

Business Area: Private Bank Processing

Area of Expertise: Technology

Contract: Permanent

Reference Code: JR-0000114885

  

Join us as a Senior Software Engineer -UI. At Barclays, we don’t just adapt to the future, we create it. As a Senior Software Engineer -UI you will support the organisation, achieve its strategic objectives by the identification of business requirements and solutions that address business problems and opportunities.

**To be a successful Senior Software Engineer -UI you should have experience with:**

* Strong hands-on experience in React.js with proven expertise in designing and developing enterprise-scale web applications.
* Solid development experience in Java, Spring Boot, and REST API development with the ability to work across UI and backend components.
* Deep understanding of modern UI technologies including React, HTML5, JavaScript, TypeScript, CSS3, LESS, Bootstrap, Node.js, Jest, and JSON over HTTP.
* Strong understanding of software design principles, design patterns, component-based architecture, and application security best practices.
* Experience building responsive, accessible, and high-performance user interfaces.
* Proficiency in integrating UI applications with RESTful services and microservices-based architectures.
* Experience working with relational databases such as Oracle and MySQL.
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to independently learn and adopt new technologies.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills with the ability to clearly articulate technical concepts.
* Experience working in Agile/Scrum delivery environments and collaborating effectively across geographically distributed teams.
* Understanding of regulatory, governance, and secure engineering practices within enterprise environments.
* Experience leading technical design discussions, code reviews, mentoring developers, and driving engineering best practices.
* 8+years of professional experience

**Additional relevant skills given below are highly valued:**

* Experience with React Native and mobile application development.
* Good understanding of the MERN Stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js).
* Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and OpenShift container platforms.
* Exposure to cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Barclays Cloud Platform (BCP).
* Understanding of micro-frontend architecture and modern frontend engineering practices.
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps tooling (GitLab, Jenkins, Git, Bitbucket).
* Knowledge of performance optimization, observability, and frontend monitoring practices.
* Familiarity with event-driven architectures and messaging platforms such as Kafka or MQ.
* Experience in Banking, Wealth Management, or Financial Services domains.
* Passion for driving UI modernization, engineering excellence, and user experience improvements.

You may be assessed on key critical skills relevant for success in role, such as risk and controls, change and transformation, business acumen, strategic thinking and digital and technology, as well as job-specific technical skills.

This role is based in Pune.

**Purpose of the role**

To design, develop and improve software, utilising various engineering methodologies, that provides business, platform, and technology capabilities for our customers and colleagues.

**Accountabilities**

* Development and delivery of high-quality software solutions by using industry aligned programming languages, frameworks, and tools. Ensuring that code is scalable, maintainable, and optimized for performance.
* Cross-functional collaboration with product managers, designers, and other engineers to define software requirements, devise solution strategies, and ensure seamless integration and alignment with business objectives.
* Collaboration with peers, participate in code reviews, and promote a culture of code quality and knowledge sharing.
* Stay informed of industry technology trends and innovations and actively contribute to the organization’s technology communities to foster a culture of technical excellence and growth.
* Adherence to secure coding practices to mitigate vulnerabilities, protect sensitive data, and ensure secure software solutions.
* Implementation of effective unit testing practices to ensure proper code design, readability, and reliability.

**Assistant Vice President Expectations**

* To advise and influence decision making, contribute to policy development and take responsibility for operational effectiveness. Collaborate closely with other functions/ business divisions.
* Lead a team performing complex tasks, using well developed professional knowledge and skills to deliver on work that impacts the whole business function. Set objectives and coach employees in pursuit of those objectives, appraisal of performance relative to objectives and determination of reward outcomes
* If the position has leadership responsibilities, People Leaders are expected to demonstrate a clear set of leadership behaviours to create an environment for colleagues to thrive and deliver to a consistently excellent standard. The four LEAD behaviours are: L – Listen and be authentic, E – Energise and inspire, A – Align across the enterprise, D – Develop others.
* OR for an individual contributor, they will lead collaborative assignments and guide team members through structured assignments, identify the need for the inclusion of other areas of specialisation to complete assignments. They will identify new directions for assignments and/ or projects, identifying a combination of cross functional methodologies or practices to meet required outcomes.
* Consult on complex issues; providing advice to People Leaders to support the resolution of escalated issues.
* Identify ways to mitigate risk and developing new policies/procedures in support of the control and governance agenda.
* Take ownership for managing risk and strengthening controls in relation to the work done.
* Perform work that is closely related to that of other areas, which requires understanding of how areas coordinate and contribute to the achievement of the objectives of the organisation sub-function.
* Collaborate with other areas of work, for business aligned support areas to keep up to speed with business activity and the business strategy.
* Engage in complex analysis of data from multiple sources of information, internal and external sources such as procedures and practises (in other areas, teams, companies, etc).to solve problems creatively and effectively.
* Communicate complex information. 'Complex' information could include sensitive information or information that is difficult to communicate because of its content or its audience.
* Influence or convince stakeholders to achieve outcomes.

All colleagues will be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Values of Respect, Integrity, Service, Excellence and Stewardship – our moral compass, helping us do what we believe is right. They will also be expected to demonstrate the Barclays Mindset – to Empower, Challenge and Drive – the operating manual for how we behave.

job.title: Senior IAM Engineer ( Chennai, Bangalore, Hyderabad) @ Navat Technologies Pvt Ltd (TN, IN)
job.description:
Job Summary

We are seeking an experienced **Senior DevOps / Platform Engineer** to design, build, and manage enterprise-scale cloud platforms that empower development teams through automation, Kubernetes, GitOps, and Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) practices. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience building Internal Developer Platforms (IDP), implementing Infrastructure as Code (IaC), automating CI/CD pipelines, and managing highly available Kubernetes environments.

This role requires a technical leader who can drive platform engineering initiatives, establish engineering standards, improve system reliability, and collaborate with development, cloud, security, and operations teams to deliver scalable cloud-native solutions.

Key Responsibilities

* Design, build, and maintain enterprise Internal Developer Platforms (IDP) to improve developer productivity.
* Architect, deploy, and manage large-scale Kubernetes platforms across cloud environments.
* Build and maintain reusable Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform.
* Implement GitOps practices using Argo CD, FluxCD, or similar GitOps tools.
* Design and develop enterprise CI/CD frameworks to automate software delivery.
* Define and implement Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) practices including SLIs, SLOs, SLAs, error budgets, and incident management.
* Automate infrastructure provisioning, application deployment, and platform operations.
* Develop reusable platform services, deployment templates, and engineering standards.
* Manage Kubernetes clusters including:
* Workloads
* Helm Charts
* Ingress Controllers
* Namespaces
* Networking
* RBAC
* Secrets Management
* Collaborate with development teams to onboard applications onto cloud-native platforms.
* Improve platform scalability, reliability, security, availability, and performance.
* Implement platform monitoring, logging, distributed tracing, and observability solutions.
* Troubleshoot complex production, infrastructure, networking, and Kubernetes issues.
* Implement DevSecOps practices throughout the software delivery lifecycle.
* Mentor DevOps engineers and platform teams while promoting engineering best practices.

Required Skills

* 8+ years of experience in DevOps, Platform Engineering, Cloud Engineering, or Site Reliability Engineering (SRE).
* Strong expertise in Kubernetes administration and platform engineering.
* Hands-on experience managing enterprise Kubernetes environments.
* Advanced knowledge of Terraform and Infrastructure as Code (IaC).
* Experience implementing GitOps using:
* Argo CD
* FluxCD
* Strong experience designing CI/CD pipelines using:
* Jenkins
* GitHub Actions
* GitLab CI/CD
* Azure DevOps
* AWS CodePipeline
* Experience working with cloud platforms including:
* Amazon Web Services (AWS)
* Microsoft Azure
* Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
* Strong understanding of Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) principles.
* Experience defining SLIs, SLOs, SLAs, and operational excellence metrics.
* Strong Linux administration and scripting skills using Bash, Python, or PowerShell.
* Experience with Docker and containerization technologies.
* Strong troubleshooting and analytical problem-solving skills.

Preferred Skills

* Service Mesh technologies:
* Istio
* Linkerd
* Observability platforms:
* Prometheus
* Grafana
* OpenTelemetry
* Jaeger
* ELK Stack
* Datadog
* Splunk
* HashiCorp Vault or enterprise secrets management.
* Kubernetes Operators and Custom Resource Definitions (CRDs).
* AWS EKS, Azure AKS, or Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE).
* Platform Engineering and Internal Developer Platform (IDP) frameworks.
* DevSecOps and container security.
* Helm package management.
* Kustomize.
* Crossplane.
* Ansible automation.
* FinOps and cloud cost optimization.
* High Availability (HA) and Disaster Recovery (DR) architectures.

Preferred Certifications

* Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)
* AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate or Professional
* HashiCorp Terraform Associate
* Certified Kubernetes Security Specialist (CKS)

Soft Skills

* Strong technical leadership and mentoring capabilities.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Strong analytical and troubleshooting abilities.
* Ability to lead platform engineering initiatives.
* Experience working in Agile and DevSecOps environments.
* Strong ownership, accountability, and continuous improvement mindset.

Why Join Us?

* Lead enterprise-scale Platform Engineering and DevOps initiatives.
* Build modern Kubernetes platforms and Internal Developer Platforms.
* Work with cutting-edge cloud-native technologies.
* Collaborate with high-performing engineering and cloud teams.
* Continuous learning, certification support, and excellent career growth opportunities.

Pay: ₹2,000,000.00 - ₹3,500,000.00 per year

Work Location: In person

job.title: DevOps Engineer (Chennai, Bangalore, Hyderabad) @ Navat Technologies Pvt Ltd (TN, IN)
job.description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a highly skilled **DevOps Engineer** with strong experience in **CI/CD, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, cloud platforms, and infrastructure automation**. The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining scalable DevOps pipelines, automating infrastructure, managing containerized applications, and ensuring high availability, security, and reliability of enterprise environments.

This role requires a hands-on engineer with expertise in cloud infrastructure, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), Kubernetes orchestration, deployment automation, and modern DevOps practices.

Key Responsibilities

* Design, build, and maintain CI/CD pipelines to automate software delivery.
* Deploy, configure, and manage Kubernetes clusters and containerized applications.
* Build and maintain Docker images and container registries.
* Implement Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform.
* Develop reusable Terraform modules for cloud infrastructure provisioning.
* Automate application deployments, infrastructure provisioning, and configuration management.
* Manage cloud infrastructure across AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
* Configure and manage Kubernetes workloads, namespaces, ingress controllers, services, and Helm charts.
* Monitor application and infrastructure health using enterprise monitoring and logging tools.
* Troubleshoot production incidents, deployment failures, infrastructure issues, and performance bottlenecks.
* Implement security best practices throughout the CI/CD pipeline (DevSecOps).
* Collaborate with development, QA, cloud, and security teams to streamline release processes.
* Maintain source code repositories and branching strategies using Git.
* Optimize infrastructure for scalability, reliability, performance, and cost efficiency.
* Create technical documentation, deployment guides, and operational runbooks.

Required Skills

* 5+ years of experience as a DevOps Engineer or Site Reliability Engineer (SRE).
* Strong experience designing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines.
* Hands-on experience with one or more CI/CD tools:
* Jenkins
* GitHub Actions
* GitLab CI/CD
* Azure DevOps
* AWS CodePipeline
* Strong experience with Kubernetes (K8s) administration.
* Hands-on experience with Docker and containerization technologies.
* Strong expertise in Terraform and Infrastructure as Code (IaC).
* Experience working with cloud platforms:
* Amazon Web Services (AWS)
* Microsoft Azure
* Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
* Experience with Linux system administration.
* Strong scripting skills using Bash, Python, or PowerShell.
* Experience using Git and version control systems.
* Knowledge of networking fundamentals, DNS, Load Balancers, SSL/TLS, and firewalls.
* Strong troubleshooting, analytical, and problem-solving skills.

Preferred Skills

* GitOps tools such as Argo CD or FluxCD.
* DevSecOps implementation and security automation.
* Helm package management.
* Ansible for configuration management.
* Prometheus and Grafana monitoring.
* ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana).
* Splunk or Datadog.
* HashiCorp Vault for secrets management.
* SonarQube, Nexus, or JFrog Artifactory.
* Kubernetes Operators.
* AWS EKS, Azure AKS, or Google GKE.
* Istio or service mesh technologies.
* Container security and image scanning.
* Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) practices.

Preferred Certifications

* Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)
* HashiCorp Terraform Associate
* AWS Certified DevOps Engineer – Professional

Soft Skills

* Excellent analytical and troubleshooting skills.
* Strong communication and collaboration abilities.
* Ability to work independently and in Agile environments.
* Strong ownership, accountability, and attention to detail.
* Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

Why Join Us?

* Work on enterprise-scale cloud and DevOps initiatives.
* Build modern CI/CD platforms and Kubernetes environments.
* Collaborate with cloud architects, developers, and security engineers.
* Gain exposure to cutting-edge DevOps and cloud-native technologies.
* Continuous learning, certification support, and career growth opportunities.

Pay: ₹900,000.00 - ₹2,000,000.00 per year

Work Location: In person

**Job Description**

The DST Business Analyst and Business Intelligence Developer for Husky will be responsible for designing, delivering, and maintaining the company’s enterprise business intelligence ecosystem, leveraging both internal and external data sources. This role will lead the development and support of enterprise-wide BI applications, data models, and analytics architecture. Working closely with senior business and IT stakeholders, the position will translate strategic data and information requirements into actionable solutions that enable data-driven decision making.

The incumbent will address complex technical challenges, optimize performance across BI platforms, and define data elements that drive meaningful insights and measurable business value. The role will also establish testing standards, develop and deliver training programs to enhance user adoption, and promote self‑service analytics. Additionally, this position will define governance standards, policies, and procedures for BI tools and data structures, establish data quality metrics, and evaluate emerging technologies to support continuous improvement of Husky’s enterprise BI capabilities.

**Key Responsibilities & Key Success Metrics**

* Leading BI software development, deployment and maintenance
* Perform Data Profiling and Data Analysis activities to understand data sources
* Report curation, template definition and analytical data modeling
* Work with cross-functional teams to gather and document reporting requirements
* Translate business requirements into specifications that will be used to implement the required reports and dashboards, created from potentially multiple data sources
* Identifies and resolves data reporting issues in a timely fashion, while looking for continuous improvement opportunities.
* Build solutions that create value and resolve business problems
* Provide technical guidance to designers and other stakeholders
* Work effectively with members of Digital Solutions Team
* Troubleshoots analytics tool problems and tunes for performance
* Develops semantic layer and analytics query objects for end users
* Translation of business questions and requirements into reports, views, and analytics query objects
* Ensuring that quality standards are met
* Supporting Master Data Management Strategy

**Qualifications:**

**Technical Skills & Experience**

* Strong understanding of ERP and operational system data structures, with the ability to interpret, navigate, and optimize complex relational databases.
* Advanced proficiency in writing high‑performance SQL queries against large‑scale, complex datasets, including optimization and troubleshooting.
* Hands‑on experience in data visualization, dashboard design, and data storytelling, with the ability to translate analytical insights into clear, compelling, and actionable narratives.
* Experience designing, debugging, and deploying BI solutions within an Azure DevOps (ADO) environment, including CI/CD practices, version control, and release management.
* Proficiency with the Microsoft BI Stack, including:

* Power BI (data modeling, DAX, visualization best practices, Power BI Service)
* SQL Server Analysis Services (SSAS/AAS)—tabular model development, optimization, and deployment

Experience working with Azure Data Platform services such as Azure Data Lake Storage (ADLS), Azure Data Factory (ADF), Azure Synapse Analytics, and Power BI Service.

Knowledge of Databricks or Microsoft Fabric is considered a strong asset.

**Business & Functional Knowledge**

* Basic understanding of manufacturing and sales business processes, with the ability to translate operational requirements into analytical solutions.
* Experience working in an international or distributed business environment, collaborating across regions and time zones.

**Analytical & Problem-Solving Skills**

* Strong analytical capabilities, with the ability to interpret requirements, profile data, validate output, and ensure accuracy across BI solutions.
* Adept at diagnosing data inconsistencies, performance issues, and modeling challenges, proposing effective, scalable solutions.

**Communication & Collaboration**

* Excellent communication and presentation skills, capable of conveying technical concepts to business stakeholders in clear, understandable terms.
* Ability to facilitate meetings, workshops, and design sessions, enabling effective collaboration and informed decision-making.
* Strong interpersonal skills, with the ability to work collaboratively with cross‑functional teams, including Data Engineering, Business Analysts, and business partners.

**Language Requirements**

* Proficiency in English is required.
* Knowledge of German or French is considered an asset.

  

Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace.
